channel.title: DIY Magazine
channel.description: UK-based music magazine bringing you music news, reviews, features, interviews and more

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo checks into heartbreak hospital in 'the cure' video
item.description: Judging from her latest single, the prognosis for 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' is, well, sad.

item.title: Album Review: Big Thief — Capacity
item.description: A devastating second album that turns introspection into something close to incantation.

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers announces UK tour
item.description: The Punisher era is officially over; the next chapter begins on stage.
